nav.readingDescription: Practice full IELTS reading tests with real passages
nav.listeningDescription: Answer real IELTS listening questions with audio
nav.writingDescription: Task-based writing simulator and band feedback

hero.title: Train Like the Real Exam. Improve Like a Pro.
hero.description: Want a higher IELTS score? You don't need endless practice, you need smart practice. On this platform, you work with real exam-style tasks and get clear feedback powered by AI, so you always know what to improve.

choose.title: Choose
choose.description: Pick the practice module that matches your goal. Choose from full-length Academic reading or listening tests designed to reflect the latest IELTS exam format and difficulty.

complete.title: Complete
complete.description: Take the test in a focused, distraction-free environment that closely mirrors the real computer-based IELTS exam, including timing, layout, and question flow.

score.title: Get Score
score.description: Submit your answers and receive instant results. See your overall score, detailed breakdowns by question type, and clear explanations for correct and incorrect answers.

improve.title: Improve
improve.description: Get personalized AI suggestions based on your mistakes. Review targeted lessons, practice specific question types, and access recommended resources to strengthen your weak areas.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Built for authentic IELTS Reading and Listening preparation with exam-focused workflows.
features.helper: Launching soon in Uzbekistan. Join the waitlist.
features.bottomNote: Writing and Speaking modules are planned next to complete full IELTS coverage.

authentic.title: Authentic Interface
authentic.description: Mirror the real IELTS computer-delivered exam layout under strict timing to reduce surprise on the exam day.

instructor.title: Personal instructor
instructor.description: Get AI-powered insights, targeted exercises, and curated learning materials designed to improve YOUR specific performance gaps.

results.title: Immediate results
results.description: Receive fast, structured feedback with full explanations right after completion for faster improvement.

expert.title: 1-to-1 Expert Support
expert.description: Schedule one-to-one coaching with a certified IELTS expert for focused feedback, clearer explanations, and a practical plan around your weakest areas.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Trusted by learners preparing for IELTS in Uzbekistan.

page.title: Real Results from Real Students
page.subtitle: Join over 10,000 students across Uzbekistan who used IELTS MASTER to achieve their dream band scores and study abroad.

cta.title: Ready to start your IELTS preparation?
cta.subtitle: Join the thousands of successful students who have achieved their target band score with IELTS MASTER.

one.name: Dilshod Karimov
one.text: Reading practice felt structured and realistic. I improved my time control in just a few mock attempts.

two.name: Madina Ismoilova
two.text: Listening sessions with countdowns helped me stay calm under pressure. My score became much more stable.

three.name: Rustam Gafurov
three.text: The interface is clean and close to the real exam format. Feedback after each attempt is very practical.

four.name: Shahnoza Tursunova
four.text: Progress tracking showed exactly which question types were slowing me down. It made my preparation focused.

five.name: Azizbek Rakhimov
five.text: The mock tests are consistent and professional. I now follow a daily routine without wasting time.

six.name: Akmaljon Rasulov
six.text: I liked the balanced mix of Reading and Listening tasks. It helped me prepare steadily every week.

comparison.title: Maximize Your Preparation
comparison.subtitle: See why creating an account is the best choice for your journey.

finalCta.title: Ready to reach your target band?
finalCta.subtitle: Stop guessing. Start practicing with the platform that mirrors the real IELTS experience. No credit card required to start.
